stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning barotrauma are correct?

options.a: It is mainly associated with a sink rate which exceeds the ability of the body to balance its internal pressures.
options.b: It is more likely to occur during ascent then during a rapid descent.
options.c: It is caused by pressure differentials between gases in hollow cavities of the body and the ambient pressure.
options.d: It is caused by an increase in the partial pressure of oxygen associated with a decrease in altitude.
